get.description: Returns API operational status and validates the core database connection.
Retrieves the executive overview metrics for a farm's Home Command Center.
Returns farm health scores and disease risk scores.
Returns risk trends over time for the farm.
Retrieves the most recent pending recommendations for the farm.
Returns a list of all geographical farms registered in the platform.
Retrieves detailed properties for a single farm.
Retrieves the aggregate health parameters and score for a specific farm.
Retrieves a list of fish tanks with pagination, optionally filtered by zone or structural type.
Retrieves static details and parameters for a specific tank.
Calculates parameter stability and stress levels for a tank.
Retrieves the latest environmental metrics snapshot for the tank.
Retrieves the complete set of AI forecasts (PSI, disease, mortality, harvest) for the tank.
Retrieves the latest pivoted environment metrics snapshot for a specific tank.
Retrieves historical ranges of raw telemetry readings for all active sensors on a tank.
Retrieves the latest disease outbreak risk forecasts for a specific tank.
Retrieves the latest predicted loss ratios and confidence intervals.
Retrieves the optimal harvest date projections and gross revenue estimations.
Retrieves all recommendations, optionally filtered by tank_id, farm_id, or status.

post.description: Registers operator acceptance of a specific AI recommendation.
Registers operator dismissal of a specific AI recommendation.

get.description: Retrieves active alerts, optionally filtered by farm, tank, status, or severity.

post.description: Acknowledges an active alert using its ID.

get.description: Retrieves the biosecurity dashboard summary metrics for a farm.
Retrieves the reference catalog of pathogens monitored in the system.
Lists active pathogen outbreak incidents and quarantine statuses for all farm tanks.
Retrieves status indicators, operational state, and calibration due dates for all farm sensors.
Retrieves the standard warning/critical metric thresholds configured for the farm.

put.description: Updates warning/critical threshold parameters for a specific metric.

get.description: Retrieves the registration properties for a single user.
Retrieves security and operations edit audit trails logged for the user.
Computes and returns a list of transient AI insights tailored for the dashboard.
Computes and returns a list of transient AI insights for a specific tank.
Retrieves the catalog of deployed AI models.
Retrieves performance metrics diagnostics (accuracy, F1, quality scores) for all models.
Retrieves details for a single AI model by ID.
